mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in RSAFS signals resilient household spending and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest snapshot as of t-2mo equals 757085.0
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by lower 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations or Rank IC is below 0.03 over a 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses below its 3-month moving average, monetary restraint is easing and equity discount rates decline, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses below its 3-month moving average by at least 0.10pp
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 3.63
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not have higher mean 20-day returns than non-triggered observations at p <= 0.10 or if the hit rate is below 50% in two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in UNRATE signals weakening labor income and rising recession risk, causing investors to mark down earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its trailing 12-month minimum by more than 0.50pp
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 4.3
failure_condition: Reject if S&P 500 60-day forward returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered cases or if triggered returns are not lower than baseline returns at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: Rising INDPRO combined with slower CPIAUCSL inflation signals improving real output and easing input-cost pressure, raising expected margins and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month growth is positive and CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation crosses below its 12-month inflation rate
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:INDPRO latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 102.6475
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 333.979
failure_condition: Reject if the joint signal's 60-day forward return mean is not positive or if INDPRO and CPIAUCSL interaction terms are insignificant at p > 0.10 in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A downside break in HOUST signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and reduced construction activity, leading investors to price slower cyclical growth and negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average by more than 10%
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest snapshot as of t-2mo equals 1465.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered downside HOUST breaks are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if average triggered returns exceed the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL while FEDFUNDS remains elevated signals renewed inflation pressure and persistent restrictive policy, compressing equity valuation multiples and producing negative returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month inflation crosses above its 12-month inflation rate while FEDFUNDS is above 3.50%
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:FEDFUNDS
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 333.979
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 3.63
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-inflation high-rate trigger is followed by nonnegative average 20-day returns or if the interaction coefficient is not negative in at least 70% of rolling estimates.

mechanism_narrative: PAYEMS growth above its recent trend with stable UNRATE signals expanding labor income without a clear unemployment shock, supporting risk appetite and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth crosses above its trailing 12-month median while UNRATE changes by less than 0.10pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 159001
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot as of t-1mo equals 4.3
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have a 5-day hit rate below 50% or if PAYEMS strength only predicts positive returns when UNRATE is excluded from the interaction specification.

mechanism_narrative: Positive GDPC1 growth signals broad real-demand expansion and stronger aggregate earnings capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 latest snapshot as of t-5mo equals 24152.656
failure_condition: Reject if positive GDPC1 growth triggers are followed by below-baseline 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of observations or if the rolling 3-year Rank IC is negative.
